verses.text: Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suahzawh kum kua leh kha sawm a phak laitakin, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar leh a galkap khempeuh Jerusalem khua a sim dingin a hong kuan uh hi
Zedekiah in a ukzawh kum sawm leh kum khat, a kha lina, a ni kua ni-in, kumpipa' khuapi kulh a hong phulet uh hi

Jerusalem khua a kilak laitakin Nergalsharezer, Samgarnebo, galkapbu Sarsekhim leh sakol galkapmang Nergalsharezer-te-a kipan Babylon kumpi uliante khempeuh hong pai-in kongpi laita penah hong tu uh hi

Judah kumpipa Zedekiah leh galkap khempeuh in amaute a muh uh ciangin a taisim uh hi. Zan laitakin kumpipa' huansung tawnin kulhte gel kikala kongpi kantanin khuapisung pan paikhia uh a, Arabah gam lam a manawh uh hi

Ahih hangin Babylon galkapte in nungdelh uh a, Jerikho zanglei-ah Zedekiah a pha uh hi. A mat khit uh ciangin Hamath gam Riblah khua-ah, Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' kiangah paipih uh a, amah in thukhenna a pia hi
Riblah khua-ah Babylon kumpipa in Zedekiah' muh mahin a tapate thahlupsak a, Judah gam kumpi ulian khempeuh zong a thatlum hi
Zedekiah' mittangte a khelkhiatsak khit ciangin kol bulh a, Babylon-ah a ciahpih hi
Babylon mite in kumpipa' inn leh midangte' innte hal uh a, Jerusalem khua kulhpi a susia uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan in khuapi sungah a kinusia lai mite pen ama kiangah a tai mite tawh, Babylon-ah sal dingin a paipih hi
Kumpi cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan in bangmah a neilo mizawng pawlkhat Judah gamah nusia a, leenggah huan leh lo a pia hi.
Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in kei tawh kisai-in kumpi cing galkapmangpa Nebuzaradan thu pia a
“Jeremiah la un. Limtakin kem un la bawlsia kei un. Ama deih bangbangin na bawl un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpi cing galkapmang Nebuzaradan tawh, galkapbu Nebushazban leh sakol galkapmang Nergalsharezer-te-a kipan Babylon kumpipa' uliante khempeuh in
thong huangsung panin kei a hong lakhia uh hi. Ahikam' tapa ahi, Shafan' tupa Gedaliah in hong kemin inn-ah a hong ciahpih dingin kei a hong ap uh hi. Tua ahih manin ka mipihte' lak mahah ka om hi.
Thong huang sungah kikhumcipin ka om laitakin Topa in hong hopih a

“Ethiopia mi Ebedmelek kiangah pai in la, ‘Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong genin-ah: En in, hih khuapi hoihna ding hilo, a siatna ding ka gensate ka tungsak ding a, tua ni a hong tun' ciangin nangmah in zong na mu ding hi
Ahih hangin Topa in kong cihin-ah, tua ni ciangin nang kong honkhia ding a, na kihtak mite' khutsungah hong kipialo ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong honkhia taktak ding a, namsau tawh thahna na thuak kei ding hi. Topa in kong cihin-ah, kei hong muang na hih manin na nuntakna na suahtak liailiai ding hi, hong ci hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” a hong ci hi.
